/* To prevent any potential data loss issues, you should review this script in detail before running it outside the context of the database designer.*/
BEGIN TRANSACTION
SET QUOTED_IDENTIFIER ON
SET ARITHABORT ON
SET NUMERIC_ROUNDABORT OFF
SET CONCAT_NULL_YIELDS_NULL ON
SET ANSI_NULLS ON
SET ANSI_PADDING ON
SET ANSI_WARNINGS ON
COMMIT
BEGIN TRANSACTION
GO
ALTER TABLE dbo.[User] ADD
	SuperAdministrator bit NOT NULL CONSTRAINT DF_User_SuperAdministrator DEFAULT 0
GO
ALTER TABLE dbo.[User] SET (LOCK_ESCALATION = TABLE)
GO
COMMIT
select Has_Perms_By_Name(N'dbo.[User]', 'Object', 'ALTER') as ALT_Per, Has_Perms_By_Name(N'dbo.[User]', 'Object', 'VIEW DEFINITION') as View_def_Per, Has_Perms_By_Name(N'dbo.[User]', 'Object', 'CONTROL') as Contr_Per 


/* To prevent any potential data loss issues, you should review this script in detail before running it outside the context of the database designer.*/
BEGIN TRANSACTION
SET QUOTED_IDENTIFIER ON
SET ARITHABORT ON
SET NUMERIC_ROUNDABORT OFF
SET CONCAT_NULL_YIELDS_NULL ON
SET ANSI_NULLS ON
SET ANSI_PADDING ON
SET ANSI_WARNINGS ON
COMMIT
BEGIN TRANSACTION
GO
ALTER TABLE dbo._AccessProfile ADD
	SuperAdministrator bit NOT NULL CONSTRAINT DF__AccessProfile_SuperAdministrator DEFAULT 0
GO
ALTER TABLE dbo._AccessProfile SET (LOCK_ESCALATION = TABLE)
GO
COMMIT
select Has_Perms_By_Name(N'dbo._AccessProfile', 'Object', 'ALTER') as ALT_Per, Has_Perms_By_Name(N'dbo._AccessProfile', 'Object', 'VIEW DEFINITION') as View_def_Per, Has_Perms_By_Name(N'dbo._AccessProfile', 'Object', 'CONTROL') as Contr_Per

BEGIN TRANSACTION
SET QUOTED_IDENTIFIER ON
SET ARITHABORT ON
SET NUMERIC_ROUNDABORT OFF
SET CONCAT_NULL_YIELDS_NULL ON
SET ANSI_NULLS ON
SET ANSI_PADDING ON
SET ANSI_WARNINGS ON
COMMIT
BEGIN TRANSACTION
GO
ALTER TABLE dbo.EDI_AccessProfile ADD
	SuperAdministrator bit NOT NULL CONSTRAINT DF_EDI_AccessProfile_SuperAdministrator DEFAULT 0
GO
ALTER TABLE dbo.EDI_AccessProfile SET (LOCK_ESCALATION = TABLE)
GO
COMMIT
select Has_Perms_By_Name(N'dbo.EDI_AccessProfile', 'Object', 'ALTER') as ALT_Per, Has_Perms_By_Name(N'dbo.EDI_AccessProfile', 'Object', 'VIEW DEFINITION') as View_def_Per, Has_Perms_By_Name(N'dbo.EDI_AccessProfile', 'Object', 'CONTROL') as Contr_Per

BEGIN TRANSACTION
SET QUOTED_IDENTIFIER ON
SET ARITHABORT ON
SET NUMERIC_ROUNDABORT OFF
SET CONCAT_NULL_YIELDS_NULL ON
SET ANSI_NULLS ON
SET ANSI_PADDING ON
SET ANSI_WARNINGS ON
COMMIT
BEGIN TRANSACTION
GO
ALTER TABLE dbo.WPL_AccessProfile ADD
	SuperAdministrator bit NOT NULL CONSTRAINT DF_WPL_AccessProfile_SuperAdministrator DEFAULT 0
GO
ALTER TABLE dbo.WPL_AccessProfile SET (LOCK_ESCALATION = TABLE)
GO
COMMIT
select Has_Perms_By_Name(N'dbo.WPL_AccessProfile', 'Object', 'ALTER') as ALT_Per, Has_Perms_By_Name(N'dbo.WPL_AccessProfile', 'Object', 'VIEW DEFINITION') as View_def_Per, Has_Perms_By_Name(N'dbo.WPL_AccessProfile', 'Object', 'CONTROL') as Contr_Per 



/* To prevent any potential data loss issues, you should review this script in detail before running it outside the context of the database designer.*/
BEGIN TRANSACTION
SET QUOTED_IDENTIFIER ON
SET ARITHABORT ON
SET NUMERIC_ROUNDABORT OFF
SET CONCAT_NULL_YIELDS_NULL ON
SET ANSI_NULLS ON
SET ANSI_PADDING ON
SET ANSI_WARNINGS ON
COMMIT
BEGIN TRANSACTION
GO
ALTER TABLE dbo.STG_AccessProfile ADD
	SuperAdministrator bit NOT NULL CONSTRAINT DF_STG_AccessProfile_SuperAdministrator DEFAULT 0
GO
ALTER TABLE dbo.STG_AccessProfile SET (LOCK_ESCALATION = TABLE)
GO
COMMIT
select Has_Perms_By_Name(N'dbo.STG_AccessProfile', 'Object', 'ALTER') as ALT_Per, Has_Perms_By_Name(N'dbo.STG_AccessProfile', 'Object', 'VIEW DEFINITION') as View_def_Per, Has_Perms_By_Name(N'dbo.STG_AccessProfile', 'Object', 'CONTROL') as Contr_Per
